text:
/ci1 2 この強さ、しっかりと地に足をつけ
時間と共に積み重なったものだな。
……ならば！

/ci1 2 こちらも相応の力、全力で応えてこそ
申し訳が立つというものだ！
なあ<%me>！

/ci1 2 Against strength so dutifully
cultivated, so firmly rooted in unflinching
purpose...

/ci1 2 ...it would be an insult to push back
with anything less than our very best! Wouldn't
you agree, <%me>!?

この強さ、しっかりと地に足をつけ
時間と共に積み重なったものだな。
……ならば！

こちらも相応の力、全力で応えてこそ
申し訳が立つというものだ！
なあ<%me>！

Against strength so dutifully cultivated, so
firmly rooted in unflinching purpose...

...it would be an insult to push back with
anything less than our very best! Wouldn't you
agree, <%me>!?
